experiment_info.experiment_description: Size-class-conditioned diffusion model trained on BraTS tumor segmentation maps (discrete labels, centered) with CFG. 3 discrete size classes (T1/T2/T3) via nn.Embedding.
experiment_info.research_question: Can a class-conditioned diffusion model generate novel tumors of specified size?

dataset_info.preprocessing: Crop foreground (from T1N bbox), pad to cubic, resize to 32^3 (nearest-neighbor), center on tumor. Integer labels {0,1,2,3}, normalized to [-1,1] at load time.
